text: uniportal thoracoscopy for secondary pneumothorax this is a 65 years old gentleman smoker with a right pneumothorax chest tube stay for more than 20 year days without improvement we plan a uniportal fats approach through the incision of the stress tube we put a soft tissue tractor we get put the lung down
Removing the pyogenic membrane from around the lung.
We here dissect lower loop from the diaphragm.
Now to the apex with the hook diathermy.
Remove the adhesion between the apex and the chest wall.
After cauterizing this 10th adhesions, we look for the large pulley that we saw on the CT scan.
And we advance and undo GIA.
with a blue reload making sure that we put it on a healthy long tissue and all the pulley are on the uppermost part after firing we check the sticker line
then advance another reload try to be within the same alignment after the firing the pulley is totally rejected from the lung we now do
an apical pleural abrasion using a diathermy scratch pad this is the result after the pleural abrasion and then we install a slime solution to check for any air leak we ask the anesthesia to
Inflate the lung and there is no air leak.
We continue removing any biogenic membrane and we try to open the fissure.
Here we manage to open the fissure.
We make another irrigation with Petitin solution.
And we check again for any air leak.

Finally we inflate the whole lung And we do an intercostal nerve block to decrease the post-operative pain On the level of the port and one level above and one level below We advance just you from the same incision This is the final result
